synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20939 Oracle Linux 9 cups bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20939
description:
[1.2.3.3op2-34]
- RHEL-112435 CVE-2025-58060 cups: Authentication Bypass in CUPS Authorization Handling
- RHEL-113078 CVE-2025-58364 cups: Null Pointer Dereference in CUPS ipp_read_io() Leading to Remote DoS
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20939

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20939.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cups-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cups-client-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cups-devel-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.i686.rpm
cups-devel-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cups-filesystem-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.noarch.rpm
cups-ipptool-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cups-libs-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.i686.rpm
cups-libs-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cups-lpd-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cups-printerapp-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
cups-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cups-client-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cups-devel-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cups-filesystem-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.noarch.rpm
cups-ipptool-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cups-libs-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cups-lpd-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cups-printerapp-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/cups-2.3.3op2-34.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.2.3.3op2-34]
- RHEL-112435 CVE-2025-58060 cups: Authentication Bypass in CUPS Authorization Handling
- RHEL-113078 CVE-2025-58364 cups: Null Pointer Dereference in CUPS ipp_read_io() Leading to Remote DoS
